dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4687 IS: Tiananmen Square Memorial Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Scott of Florida introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To designate Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard in Washington, District of Columbia, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Tiananmen Square Memorial Act of 2026.

section.header: Designation of Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard

paragraph.text: The area along International Place Northwest between 3501 International Place Northwest and 3507 International Place Northwest in Washington, District of Columbia, shall be known and designated as Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the area referred to in paragraph (1) shall be deemed to be a reference to Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard.
The address of 3505 International Place Northwest, Washington, District of Columbia, shall be redesignated as 1 Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the address referred to in paragraph (1) shall be deemed to be a reference to 1 Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard.

subsection.text: The Administrator of General Services shall construct street signs that shall—

paragraph.text: contain the phrase Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard;
be similar in design to the signs used by the District of Columbia to designate the location of Metro stations; and

subparagraph.text: the parcel of Federal property that is closest to 1 Tiananmen Square Memorial Boulevard (as redesignated by subsection (b)(1)); and
the street corners of International Drive Northwest and Van Ness Street Northwest and International Drive Northwest and International Place Northwest in Washington, District of Columbia.
